title: Native Pi TUI parallel worker proof 02B
goal: Create one tiny in-scope evidence note for the post-anchor native Pi TUI parallel worker proof. The note must say this is worker B of the four-worker native TUI proof and that KD-owned submit_worker_result artifacts are authoritative, not terminal text.
acceptance: Create docs/design/evidence/tui-worker-multi-proof-02B-2026-07-08.md stating that this is worker B for the post-anchor four-worker native Pi TUI parallel proof and that KD-owned submit_worker_result artifacts are authoritative, not terminal text.
